hero.text1: I'm an Argentinian chef with experience cooking worldwide, having a solid background in high-end and michelin rated restaurants, as well as a Private chef for UHNW clients between Madrid and New York.

cuisine.text2-1: "Seasonality, culture, and travel have shaped the chef I am today."
cuisine.text2-2: Rooted in Argentina, shaped by Italian-Spanish heritage,Criollo & Mediterranean flavors are core in my cooking. Traveling and training across South America and Europe, working alongside chefs from around the globe, I've accomplished great skill in cross cuisines: Latino, Italian,Spanish & Asian, have been central in my craft surprising clients worldwide.
cuisine.text2-3: "Grounded in a deep respect for seasonality, my cooking is as flavorful as it is refined, warmth and depth."

myServices.text3: I invite you to a personal consultation to discuss your upcoming event. From the initial concept to the final garnish, I am at your disposal to curate every detail of your bespoke culinary experience.

bookMe.title-text4: Tailored Culinary Experiences & Special Health-Oriented Meals
bookMe.text4-1: Whether you need a private chef for executive meals, special occasions, or family-style dining, we are happy to arrange short-term bookings by the day or longer stays throughout Spain or across Europe.
bookMe.text4-2: If your needs are more health-oriented, we have extensive experience designing menus for high performers, nutritional goals, and specific diets with excellent results.

blog.text5: Here you can read my latest articles...

contact.form-title: Book me as your Private Chef for Your special meal prep needs, Next Event or In-Home Dining Experience.
contact.form-text: Share a few details about your occasion below - I'll do the rest, crafting a personalized service tailored to your needs.

form.name: Full Name:
form.consent: By checking this box, I agree to receive SMS messages related to my inquiry, including chef availability, event confirmations, and appointment reminders. Message & data rates may apply. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
